title: Pan-Seared Lamb Kebabs
description: A simple lamb dish served with a crunchy side, inspired by Norwegian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, cut into kebab pieces
ingredients.notes: Make sure to pat dry with paper towels before cooking

ingredients.name: Norwegian-style stir-fry sauce
ingredients.notes: You can also use store-bought soy sauce as a substitute

ingredients.name: Crunchy fried onions
ingredients.notes: You can use store-bought or make your own

instructions: Season the lamb pieces with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb pieces until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the lamb to a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat the stir-fry sauce in the same pan over medium heat.
Add the crunchy fried onions and cook until crispy.
To serve, place the lamb kebabs on a plate, top with the stir-fry sauce mixture, and garnish with parsley.
Serve with lemon wedges on the side.
